heading: Cloud Providers and Regions for Dedicated Search Nodes
body:
Atlas supports deploying separate [Search Nodes](configure-search-nodes) for `M10` and higher
clusters to a subset of AWS (Amazon Web Services), Google Cloud, or Azure (Microsoft Azure) regions.

For more information, see:

- [AWS Dedicated Search Nodes](amazon-aws-search-nodes)

- [GCP Dedicated Search Nodes](google-gcp-search-nodes)

- [Azure Dedicated Search Nodes](microsoft-azure-search-nodes)
